_doc: Mirrored client/bot scratchspaces. Each entry is rsynced into <client>/ on cron by .github/workflows/sync-client-labs.yml. Bots push to their own repo; this lab repo is the publish surface. To onboard a new client: create antimofm/lab-<client>, attach a write deploy key, install on the bot host, then add a one-line entry below.
